About

Adam
Bogdan

Miami-based DJ and producer Adam Bogdan has spent over 20 years behind the decks — starting in Romania before moving through Germany and Ibiza, and planting his flag at the heart of the Miami underground house music scene.

A no-boundary artist with a wide musical vision, he has performed for crowds across Europe, the Caribbean, and the USA — holding residencies at Fontainebleau, Arkadia Day Club, The Anderson, Mode Miami, and The Sylvester.

His sound moves through minimal house, deep tech house, and long hypnotic grooves — sprinkled with dub textures and vocal elements. The throughline is always the same: groove, first and always.

Minimal House Deep Tech Miami Underground 20+ Years

Label

Rapture'sDeli

Miami's underground house label — born from over two years of pushing the city's underground boundaries across more than 25 successful events. Deep, groovy, and uncompromisingly underground.

Artists: Adam Bogdan · Sepp · Boghian · and more
